Hybrid OS
Overview
Dashboard Philosophy
Weekly Routine
Monday: Strength A Tuesday: Zone 2 + Core Wednesday: Strength B Thursday: Zone 2 + Core Friday: Strength A Saturday: Zone 2 + Core Sunday: Strength B
Resources
Recovery Protocol Movement Quality

Hybrid Athlete Blueprint

v1.0 • Jack of All Trades → Top 1% Through Consistency

System Active
Current Focus
General Preparedness

Building base capacity across all 7 pillars.

Training Frequency
6 Days / Week

1 Rest Day • High Consistency Required

Primary Goal
Longevity & Resilience

Minimum Effective Dose • Highest ROI

The 7 Pillars of Performance

🏋️
Full Body Strength
4x/Week • 60-75m
🧘
Core System
3x/Week • 15-20m
⚡
Muscular Endurance
3x/Week • 20-30m
❤️
Zone 2 Cardio
3x/Week • 30-45m
🤸
Movement Quality
Daily • 10-15m
🚀
Athletic Finishers
4x/Week • 10-15m
💤
Recovery
Daily • Priority #1
MONDAY

Strength A + Sprint Finisher

Back Squat

Compound Legs Strength
Cue: Break at hips and knees simultaneously. Keep chest up. Drive through mid-foot.
Sets 4
Reps 5-8
RPE 7-8

Bench Press

Horizontal Push Chest
Sets4
Reps6-10

Romanian Deadlift

Hinge Hamstrings
Sets3
Reps8-10

Pull Ups / Lat Pulldown

Vertical Pull Back
Sets4
Reps6-10

Overhead Press

Vertical Push Shoulders
Sets3
Reps8-10

Accessories Circuit

Exercise Sets Reps Focus
Bulgarian Split Squat 3 10/side Unilateral Leg
Chest Supported Row 3 10-12 Upper Back
Lateral Raise 3 15-20 Side Delts
Face Pull 3 15 Rear Delts/Rotator
Standing Calf Raise 4 12-15 Calves
Tibialis Raise 3 15-20 Knee Health

🔥 Athletic Finisher: Sprints

6 x 20m OR 5 x 30m. Full recovery between sets. Max effort.

Post-Workout Static Stretching

Hold each for 45-60s: Hamstrings, Hip Flexors, Glutes, Adductors, Calves, Chest, Lats, Shoulders, Triceps, Forearms, Neck.

TUESDAY

Zone 2 + Core + Muscular Endurance

Zone 2 Cardio

Aerobic Base
Choose One: Incline Walking, Jogging, Cycling, Rowing, Swimming.
Intensity: Conversational pace. Heart rate ~130-150 bpm.
Duration30-45m

Core Routine

ExerciseSetsReps/Time
Dead Bug310/side
Pallof Press312/side
Side Plank330-45 sec
Hanging Leg Raise310-15
Ab Wheel38-12
Suitcase Carry330m

Muscular Endurance Circuit

Perform 3-5 Rounds. Minimal rest between exercises.

ExerciseReps
Push Ups20
Bodyweight Squats25
Inverted Rows15
Walking Lunges20
Kettlebell Swings20
Jump Rope60 sec

Daily Mobility

Deep Squat Hold (2m), World's Greatest Stretch (5/side), 90-90 Hip Switch (10), Couch Stretch (1m), Thoracic Rotation (10/side).
WEDNESDAY

Strength B + Agility Finisher

Trap Bar Deadlift

Hinge Full Body
Sets4
Reps5

Incline DB Press

Horizontal Push Upper Chest
Sets4
Reps8

Front Squat

Squat Quads/Core
Sets3
Reps8

Barbell Row

Horizontal Pull Back Thickness
Sets4
Reps8

Weighted Chin Up

Vertical Pull Biceps/Back
Sets3
Reps6-8

Accessories

ExerciseSetsReps
Hip Thrust310
Rear Delt Fly315
Hamstring Curl312
Weighted Dips310
Farmer Carry430m
Neck Training220

🔥 Athletic Finisher: Agility

Ladder Drills, Cone Drills, or Shuttle Runs. Focus on foot speed and direction change.

THURSDAY

Zone 2 + Core + Explosive Finisher

Zone 2 Cardio

Duration30-45m

Core Routine

Same as Tuesday. Dead Bug, Pallof Press, Side Plank, Hanging Leg Raise, Ab Wheel, Suitcase Carry.

🔥 Athletic Finisher: Explosive

Box Jumps, Broad Jumps, Bounds, Depth Drops. Focus on maximal power output.

Daily Mobility

FRIDAY

Strength A + Plyometric Finisher

Repeat Monday's Strength A workout. See above for details.

🔥 Athletic Finisher: Plyometrics

Box Jump, Broad Jump, Bounds, Depth Drop.

SATURDAY

Zone 2 + Core + Long Mobility

Zone 2 Cardio

Duration30-45m

Core Routine

Same as Tuesday/Thursday.

Muscular Endurance Circuit

Same as Tuesday. 3-5 Rounds.

Extended Mobility Session

20-30 Minute Full Body Stretch Session. Focus on deep tissue release and flexibility.
SUNDAY

Strength B + Reaction Finisher

Repeat Wednesday's Strength B workout. See above for details.

🔥 Athletic Finisher: Reaction

Ball Drop drills, Mirror Drills, Random Direction Change.

Recovery Checklist

Daily Non-Negotiables

  • Sleep 7.5-9 Hours
  • Protein 1.6-2.2 g/kg
  • Hydration (3-4L)
  • 6,000-10,000 Daily Steps

Progression Rules

  • ✓ Progressive Overload (Add weight/reps weekly)
  • ✓ Deload Every 6-8 Weeks
  • ✓ Good Exercise Technique > Ego
  • ✓ Never Train Through Sharp Pain

Hybrid Athlete OS v1.0 • Designed for Long-Term Consistency
